options.name: -gridInMicron
options.description: specify the value (in micron) of side of square grid for density calculations.

options.name: -gridInRow
options.description: specify the value (in row-height) of side of square grid for density calculations.

options.name: -threshold
options.description: threshold value over which the densities must be reported.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
